weekly_schedule.description: Edit every day of the week, define goal hours or a fixed time range, and mark days off when needed.
weekly_schedule.load_error: Unable to load the weekly schedule.
weekly_schedule.save_error: Unable to save the weekly schedule.
weekly_schedule.day_off_hint: This day will be treated as a day off.
history.page.title: History
history.page.description: Review your worked days, switch between list and calendar views, and edit past shifts.
exports.dialog.title: Export hours
exports.dialog.description.history: Download worked hours for any selected period up to six months.
exports.dialog.description.month: Download the currently selected month range in the chosen file format.
exports.dialog.description.semester: Download the currently selected semester range in the chosen file format.
exports.error.range_order: The end date must be the same as or after the start date.
exports.error.range_future: Dates cannot be in the future.
exports.error.range_limit: The export date range cannot exceed six months.
exports.error.generic: Unable to export shifts right now.
history.empty.title: No worked days in this month
history.empty.description: Select another month or start a shift to create your first entry.
history.dialog.description: Edit shifts, remove breaks, or delete incorrect entries.
history.dialog.empty: No shifts were found for this day.
history.dialog.invalid_period: End time must be after start time.

settings.layout.title: Settings
settings.layout.description: Manage your profile and account settings
settings.app.heading: App settings
settings.profile.heading: Profile
settings.profile.description: Update your name and email address
settings.profile.name: Name
settings.profile.email_resend: Click here to re-send the verification email.
settings.profile.email_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
settings.security.heading: Update password
settings.security.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
settings.appearance.heading: Appearance settings
settings.appearance.description: Update the appearance settings for your account
settings.delete.heading: Delete account
settings.delete.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
settings.delete.warning_description: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
settings.delete.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
settings.delete.confirm_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
settings.two_factor.heading: Two-factor authentication
settings.two_factor.enable_description: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.two_factor.enabled_description: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.two_factor.modal.enabled_descri: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
settings.two_factor.modal.enable_descrip: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
settings.two_factor.modal.verify_descrip: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
settings.two_factor.recovery.heading: 2FA recovery codes
settings.two_factor.recovery.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
settings.two_factor.recovery.footnote: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate codes above.
settings.passkeys.heading: Passkeys
settings.passkeys.description: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
settings.passkeys.empty_description: Add a passkey to sign in without a password
settings.passkeys.unsupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
settings.passkeys.name: Passkey name
settings.passkeys.name_hint: A name helps you identify this passkey later.
settings.passkeys.remove_description: Are you sure you want to remove the ":name" passkey? You will no longer be able to use it to sign in.
home.hero.description: Kairo is a precise hours tracker for tracking hours, logging shifts, and reading overtime balance without spreadsheet noise or bloated software.
home.how_it_works.title: Track work hours, shift logs, and overtime in real time.
home.how_it_works.description: Open Kairo and read the exact state of your work routine. Each clock-in becomes a clear view of today's hours, overtime balance, and semester history.
home.how_it_works.point_balance: See instantly whether your hours balance is positive or negative.
home.how_it_works.point_action: Use one central action to start, pause, and resume every workshift.
home.timezone.caption: Shift history adapts automatically to where you are.
home.timezone.title: A time tracker that stays correct across timezones.
home.timezone.description_1: If your work routine moves between cities or countries, Kairo preserves the exact record. Each shift log is stored once and displayed in your local time.
home.timezone.description_2: That keeps tracking hours, overtime balance, and past workshifts readable wherever you open the app.
home.features.title: Hours tracker built for shifts, overtime, and routine control
home.features.description: Kairo focuses on precise time management: tracking hours, preserving shift logs, and keeping work routines readable.
home.features.flexible.title: Structured shifts
home.features.flexible.description: Set fixed schedules or target hours. Change future rules without damaging past records.
home.features.history.title: Editable shift log
home.features.history.description: Correct missed clock-outs, update recorded work hours, and keep the timeline exact.
home.features.privacy.title: Private work routine
home.features.privacy.description: Kairo is a personal time logging utility, not a manager surveillance panel.
home.cta.title: Start tracking hours with Kairo.
home.cta.description: Use a focused time tracker for work hours, shift logs, and overtime balance. Open your account and keep the record exact.
home.footer.description: Kairo is a precision time tracker for work hours, shift logs, and private overtime balance control.
home.meta.title: Time Tracker for Shifts and Work Hours
home.meta.description: Kairo is a precise time tracker and hours tracker for work hours, shift logs, overtime balance, and daily hour tracking.
